content: Canvas2D bake-on-freeze pattern: when a shell freezes, render it once to an OffscreenCanvas (or in-memory HTMLCanvasElement), then on subsequent frames drawImage() the cached bitmap to the main canvas. This eliminates per-frame star iteration for frozen shells. Only the frontier (index 0) is re-rendered every rAF. OffscreenCanvas is supported in iOS 16.4+; for older devices fall back to HTMLCanvasElement offscreen. Cache is invalidated only if zoom changes past a LOD threshold. At far zoom, don't bake full detail—bake a lower-detail version.
